notes: Unified EMI end-of-life across all pages + close-date overrides term. NEW: two shared helpers — _emiEndIso(e) (the single authoritative end month: a close event's month wins over the months term, extend or shorten) and _emiActiveWindow(e, months) (start/end indices using it). The projection engine EMI loop, the Budget page EMI tubes + 'until' labels, and the horizon-shrink warning ALL now use these, so they can never disagree about when an EMI ends. EMI close semantics fixed: the close month is the LAST PAID month (inclusive) — e.g. a phone EMI closed at June still pays in June and is gone from July. This fixes June total expense excluding the 17k phone EMI (was showing 167k, now 184k) while July correctly drops to 167k. Closing an EMI in the Instruments modal now also rewrites its months term (start→close inclusive) so Edit-my-inputs reflects the same end and can never conflict again. Investment close semantics unchanged (close month stops contributions). Verified: phone EMI start 2026-03 + close 2026-06 overrides stale months=2 → active Mar-Jun, paid through June, empty July.
